title: TxFastLoad
description: (lifestealsmp.com) Makes your game load quickly, removes all loading screens, makes texture packs load much faster, so even if you join LifeSteal SMP, it will load insanely fast.
body:
This mod makes your game load & run faster. 

Features:
1. Removes "Loading terrain..." screen, such as when switching world dimension.
2. Removes resource pack loading/reloading screen, so all texture packs load insanely fast (even when joining/leaving servers), allowing you to play without interruptions.
3. Optimizes resource pack loading, some heavy resource packs can load up to 90% faster.
4. Removes the fade effect when launching Minecraft.

(Joining lifestealsmp.com, which uses a resource pack, no screen & no lag.)
![video](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e4330719b4125575b5c451ea897387875985c88.gif)

Incompatible with: QuickPack, Remove Reloading Screen, Force Close Loading Screen

Warning: DynamicFPS can cause the resource pack loading screen to be black, it is advised to not use it at all.

Support server: discord.gg/lifestealsmp.com
